heading: Trespass on Bureau of Prisons reservations and land
label: 1793 Trespass on Bureau of Prisons reservations and land
text: Whoever, without lawful authority or permission, goes upon a reservation, land, or a facility of the Bureau of Prisons shall be fined under this title or imprisoned not more than six months, or both.
notes: Amendments1994— substituted “fined under this title” for “fined not more than $500”.Pub. L. 103–322
amendments: Amendments1994— substituted “fined under this title” for “fined not more than $500”.Pub. L. 103–322
